personas.name: Satisfied User
personas.description: A user who finds the Calm app helpful for stress relief and relaxation, but may face financial constraints that limit their ability to afford a subscription.
context: Using the app for stress relief and relaxation
Considering affordability when choosing a meditation app
constraints: Financial constraints that limit subscription affordability

personas.name: Relaxing User
personas.description: A user seeking relaxation and stress relief through meditation and calming content, valuing ease of use and effective tools for managing mental wellness.
goals: find a calming and relaxing experience
context: using the app for personal relaxation and stress relief
valuing user-friendly interface and high-quality content
constraints: limited time for meditation and relaxation

personas.name: Frustrated Subscriber
personas.description: A person struggling to cancel their Calm subscription, frustrated by the difficulty of the process and the continued charges despite their cancellation attempts.

personas.name: Insomniac Seeker
personas.description: A person who struggles with sleep and seeks assistance from the Calm app to relax and fall asleep, valuing its help and loving its sleep stories.

personas.name: Frustrated User
personas.description: A user who is frustrated with the paid subscription model of the Calm app, feeling that the app's features are locked behind a paywall and that the free trial is not sufficient to experience the full benefits of the app.
goals: to use the app without paying
constraints: sensitive to being charged without consent

personas.name: Frustrated Listener
personas.description: A person who uses the Calm app for relaxation and sleep but is frustrated with the limited free features and soundscapes, often feeling interrupted by ads and restricted by the free version's limitations.
goals: Listen to soundscapes and relaxing music
Use the app for sleep and meditation
context: Using the app for relaxation and sleep
Aware of the free version's limitations
constraints: Cannot afford to pay for a subscription
Needs to use the free version

personas.name: Frugal User
personas.description: A budget-conscious individual who is hesitant to pay for app subscriptions and features, seeking free alternatives and often perceiving paid services as overpriced.

personas.name: Daily Calm User
personas.description: A person who uses Calm daily to feel refreshed and grounded, seeking a positive mindset and self-care.
goals: start the day feeling refreshed and grounded
